name: CLAW-Pipeline
description: CLAW-CODE inspired hook pipeline, session compaction, and permission escalation for OpenClaw. Registers before_tool_call and after_tool_call hooks to intercept and audit all tool execution.

compactThreshold.description: Token threshold to trigger session compaction

compactPreserve.description: Number of recent messages to preserve during compaction

logFile.description: Path to hook audit log file

dangerousPatterns.description: Command patterns to block in exec tool
